rulings.Case Title: DAVID EMERY VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, OCTOBER 12, 2007, LINE 1, DEFENDANT GOULDS PUMPS, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: JON ANDREGG et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, OCTOBER 12, 2007, LINE 2, DEFENDANT VIAD CORP.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. THE DECISION IN PAYNE V. SABERHAGEN HOLDINGS APPEARS TO BE COLLATERAL ESTOPPEL TO DEFENDANT'S CLAIM THAT IT IS NOT THE SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST. IN ADDITION, PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. UNDER THE DE FACTO MERGER THEORY OF LIABILITY DEFENDANT DID NOT SERVE SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND HAS FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF ON CAUSATION. ON THE ISSUE OF STRICT LIABILITY, THE LEHMAN DECLARATION IS ADMISSIBLE AND DEFENDANT HAS NO DUTY TO WARN FOR INSULATION INSTALLED BY THE NAVY. IT APPEARS THAT THE EQUIPMENT CAME WITH SOME ASBESTOS ON IT AND IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT DEFENDANT HAS NEGATED AND/OR CLARIFIED WHETHER PLAINTIFF WAS EXPOSED TO ASBESTOS THAT WAS A PART OF THE ORIGINAL EQUIPMENT AND FOR THAT REASON SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED ON THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: JON ANDREGG et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, OCTOBER 12, 2007, LINE 2, DEFENDANT CRANE CO.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT IN THAT PLAITIFF HAS NO EVIDENCE OF WORKING ON THE ORIGINAL EQUIPMENT OF DEFENDANT OR ANY AFTER MARKET PACKING CONTAINING ASBESTOS THAT WAS SUPPLIED BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO WARN THEORY OF LIABILITY HAS NOT BEEN ADOPTED IN ASBESTOS CASES IN CALIFORNIA. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: W. WONG CONSTRUCTION CO., INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPO VS. WATT KIN YUEN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, OCTOBER 12, 2007, LINE 4, PLAINTIFFS W. WONG CONSTRUCTION CO., INC., WALTER WONG, AND JAIDIN CONSULTING GROUP, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED, FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION ALLEGES BOTH AN "IMPROPER SLOPE" AND "BUILDING FLOOR BELOW THE INTERIOR LOBBY ENTRANCE." WONG'S MOTION ONLY ADDRESSES THE "IMPROPER SLOPE." FURTHER, WONG FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE DOORS WERE THE EXCLUSIVE CAUSE OF THE FLOODING. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: PELOTON PRODUCTIONS A SOLE PROPRIETORSHIP BY VS. SIERRA CLUB
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Sierra Club'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, OCTOBER 12, 2007, LINE 13, DEFENDANT SIERRA CLUB'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT ANY JUDGMENT IN THIS CASE WOULD BIND DUNCAN, AS A CONSEQUENCE, DUNCAN IS NEITHER A NECESSARY NOR INDISPENSABLE PARTY. BY PROCEEDING IN THIS WAY, PLAINTIFF IS TAKING THE RISK THAT DUNCAN WILL MAKE A CLAIM BUT THAT IS A RISK PLAINTIFF APPEARS WILLING TO TAKE. =(302/PJM/LB)
